programme.title: The King's Speech
programme.desc: England's Prince Albert must ascend the throne as King George VI, but he has a speech impediment. Knowing that the country needs her husband to be able to communicate effectively, Elizabeth hires Lionel Logue, an Australian actor and speech therapist, to help him overcome his stammer. An extraordinary friendship develops between the two men, as Logue uses unconventional means to teach the monarch how to speak with confidence.

An extraordinary friendship develops between the two men, as Logue uses unconventional means to teach the monarch how to speak with confidence.

programme.title: A Birder's Guide to Everything
programme.desc: On the eve of his father's remarriage, a teenage birding enthusiast (Kodi Smit-McPhee) leads his friends on a road trip to find an extremely rare duck.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: A bank robber meets the love his life who works at the front desk of a storage facility where he hid $7 million in stolen loot.

programme.title: Crocodile
programme.desc: After noticing her swamp nest is missing an egg, an angry crocodile stalks college students (Mark McLachlan, Caitlin Martin, Chris Solari) on a houseboat for spring break.

programme.title: Replicant
programme.desc: Detective Jake Riley (Michael Rooker) is on the trail of serial killer Edward "The Torch" Garrotte (Jean-Claude Van Damme), who murders mothers and sets them ablaze after they're dead. Nearing retirement, Riley is removed from the case but is soon contacted by a government agency that has created a clone of Garrotte using a secret technology. The replicant (also Van Damme) teams with Riley to help track down the killer, but despite the novel approach, Garrotte will be hard to stop.

programme.title: Electric Slide
programme.desc: In 1980s Los Angeles, antique dealer Eddie Dodson robs more than 60 banks and becomes known as the "Gentleman Bank Robber."

programme.title: End Of Watch
programme.desc: Officers Brian Taylor (Jake Gyllenhaal) and Mike Zavala (Michael Peña) form a powerful brotherhood to ensure they both go home at the end of their shifts in South Central, Los Angeles.

programme.title: Streets of Blood
programme.desc: Two New Orleans lawmen (Val Kilmer, 50 Cent) investigate the murder of a fellow officer in the wake of Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: A bank robber meets the love his life who works at the front desk of a storage facility where he hid $7 million in stolen loot.

programme.title: Crocodile
programme.desc: After noticing her swamp nest is missing an egg, an angry crocodile stalks college students (Mark McLachlan, Caitlin Martin, Chris Solari) on a houseboat for spring break.

programme.title: Mother's Day
programme.desc: From the director of PRETTY WOMAN comes a feel-good comedy about the intersecting lives of four families over a crazy week leading up to Mother's Day.

programme.title: Accidentally in Love
programme.desc: Edie, an American student in London, falls in love with James, a young advertising executive, just days before she's to return to the states. Six years later, after a chance re-encountering, will they take a chance on true love?

programme.title: Begin Again
programme.desc: Gretta (Keira Knightley) and her songwriting partner/lover Dave (Adam Levine) head for New York when he lands a record deal with a major label. However, Gretta is suddenly left on her own when Dave gives in to the temptations that come with his newfound success. Things take a turn for the better for her when Dan (Mark Ruffalo), a disgraced record executive, discovers Gretta performing in a club. A mutually life-changing bond forms between the pair as they work together on Gretta's first album.

programme.title: Write Place, Write Time
programme.desc: When Paige's mother wants to sell her publishing firm, Paige decides to write under a pseudonym, so no one—not even Daniel—will know that it's her family who poses the threat in the first place.

programme.title: The Mystery Cruise
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Alvirah and Regan witness a real murder attempt on a murder mystery cruise.

programme.title: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. Two sisters embark on a journey of discovery and reconciliation.

programme.title: After All These Years
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A woman is wrongly accused of the death of her ex-husband.

programme.title: Kiss at Pine Lake
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Luke Garvey buys his uncle's Camp, Pine Lake.

programme.title: Gaslit By My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
programme.desc: Morgan's life begins to turn around, until Rodney gets diagnosed with cancer.

programme.title: The Gilgo Beach Killer
programme.desc: Inspired by Mari Gilbert's pursuit of justice for her missing daughter, Shannan.

programme.title: I Was Lorena Bobbitt
programme.desc: 26 years since Lorena Bobbitt's notorious abuse case.

programme.title: Gaslit By My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
programme.desc: Morgan's life begins to turn around, until Rodney gets diagnosed with cancer.

programme.title: Giving Hope: The Ni'cola Mitchell Story
programme.desc: A successful author, publisher and speaker realizes that her calling is to help disadvantaged girls.

programme.title: 5 Guys a Week
programme.desc: Former news anchor Nicole is chasing down her biggest story yet--true love.

programme.title: Faith in the Flames: The Nichole Jolly Story
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of a courageous EMS provider who put her life at risk.

programme.title: New: Torn From Her Arms
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must find their way back to each other.

programme.title: The Real MVP: The Wanda Durant Story
programme.desc: NBA star Kevin Durant's mom Wanda's inspiring true story of dedication.

programme.title: #BlackLove
programme.desc: The women are pushed by the experts to dig deeper in order to move forward.

programme.title: Juliet, Naked
programme.desc: Annie breaks up with her longtime boyfriend Duncan -- a teacher who's obsessed with former 1990s rocker Tucker Crowe. She soon develops an unexpected bond with Tucker when he visits his pregnant daughter in London.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: After their ship is torpedoed by a Japanese submarine, the crew members of the USS Indianapolis face a harrowing nightmare as their ship goes down in the shark infested Philippine Sea.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: On Dec. 7, 1941, Japanese forces launch a devastating attack on Pearl Harbor, the U.S. naval base in Hawaii. Six months later, the Battle of Midway commences on June 4, 1942, as the Japanese navy once again plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: The true story of Pfc. Desmond T. Doss (Andrew Garfield), who won the Congressional Medal of Honor despite refusing to bear arms during WWII on religious grounds. Doss was drafted and ostracized by fellow soldiers for his pacifist stance but went on to earn respect and adoration for his bravery, selflessness and compassion after he risked his life -- without firing a shot -- to save 75 men in the Battle of Okinawa.

programme.title: The Phantom
programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers (2011)
programme.desc: A gifted ensemble cast sparks this bold retelling of Alexander Dumas' classic tale of friendship and heroism. With Christoph Waltz as wily Cardinal Richelieu.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: The Phantom
programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, soldier Luc Devereaux (Jean-Claude Van Damme) finds that his superior officer, Andrew Scott (Dolph Lundgren), has turned violently deranged, and the two fight to the death. After their bodies are retrieved, they are placed into a secret program in which they are reanimated and trained to become unquestioning killing machines. While Devereaux and Scott initially have no memory of their former lives, glimpses of their pasts start to return, rekindling their intense conflict.

programme.title: The Hunted
programme.desc: After its boat capsizes, a group of migrants is rescued by rich Europeans who offer shelter on the island where they are vacationing. The miracle becomes a nightmare when the saviors reveal their true plan and turn into ruthless man hunters.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: A turf battle between New York City street gangs that rages from Coney Island to the Bronx. The Warriors are mistakenly fingered for the killing of a gang leader. Soon they have every gang in the city out to get revenge, and they must make their way across the city to their own turf.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Seasoned adventurer Dirk Pitt (Matthew McConaughey) sets out for the African desert with his sarcastic companion (Steve Zahn) in search of a ship rumored to have vanished long ago, the main draw being the treasure supposedly hidden within the lost vessel. When the daring duo come across a beautiful scientist (Penélope Cruz) who is juggling an escape from a warlord and a mission to stop the spread of a powerful plague, their desert expedition begins to heat up.

programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: A small-time gambler gets more than he bargained for when his car breaks down near a remote desert town.

programme.title: Desperate Measures
programme.desc: With his son gravely ill, a police detecitve hunts down an escaped killer who's an exact bone marrow match.

programme.title: Crossroads
programme.desc: A young slide guitar player and an old pro head to a mythical place where deals are made and legends are born.

programme.title: Cops And Robbersons
programme.desc: A suburban family's life is turned upside down when their home is used to stake out the mobster next door.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: A couple of lazy hunter-gatherers are banished from their villlage and set off on an epic journey.

programme.title: Bad for Each Other
programme.desc: Dr. Tom Owen (Charlton Heston) is an Army doctor on leave to visit his mother, who still lives in the poor Pennsylvania mining town where he grew up. After falling in love with wealthy socialite Helen Curtis (Lizabeth Scott), Tom turns down a position as the local doctor and takes a lucrative job at an elite Pittsburgh clinic. Though he's happy with his newfound success and his recent engagement to Helen, a cave-in at the town mine forces Tom to decide where his heart really lies.

programme.title: Three for the Show
programme.desc: Julie (Betty Grable), a beloved singer, is married to songwriter Marty Stewart (Jack Lemmon), who disappears while serving in the Korean War. Eventually, Julie assumes that her husband has died and marries Marty's closest pal, Vernon Lowndes (Gower Champion). Vernon and Julie have a happy marriage until Marty suddenly arrives back home, alive and well. The two men are at one another's throats, and Julie is mortified -- that is, until she realizes there may be an advantage to having two husbands.

programme.title: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Edwin O'Connor, this political drama focuses on Frank Skeffington (Spencer Tracy), an aging mayor who is embarking on his final campaign for reelection. Aided by his nephew, Adam Caulfield (Jeffrey Hunter), and savvy strategist John Gorman (Pat O'Brien), Skeffington faces considerable challenges as the political landscape that he knows slowly crumbles away, but, undaunted, he remains determined to stay in the game a bit longer.

programme.title: To Sir, With Love
programme.desc: American Mark Thackeray (Sidney Poitier) recently received his degree in engineering, but cannot find work. To make ends meet, he takes a job as a teacher in a rough London East End school populated mostly with troublemakers who were rejected from other schools for their behavior. While the students at first see Thackeray as just another teacher open for ridicule and bullying, his calm demeanor and desire to see them succeed gradually earn him their respect.

programme.title: Dickie Roberts: Former Child Star
programme.desc: Desperate to revive his career, Dickie tries to audition for a role in Rob Reiner's new movie but the director doesn't believe Dickie is normal enough to play the part.

programme.title: Black Sheep
programme.desc: Dedicated to helping his big brother Al (Tim Matheson) win the race for Washington State governor, he turns every opportunity for votes into an embarrassing disaster.

programme.title: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: Tommy's earned his diploma and a job at Callahan Auto Parts. However, the family business starts tanking and now Tommy hits the road with his dad's right-hand man, a smug numberscruncher.

programme.title: Dickie Roberts: Former Child Star
programme.desc: Desperate to revive his career, Dickie tries to audition for a role in Rob Reiner's new movie but the director doesn't believe Dickie is normal enough to play the part.

programme.title: Cop and a Half
programme.desc: Young Devon Butler (Norman D. Golden II) lives with his grandmother, Rachel (Ruby Dee), spending his days obsessing over television cop shows and his aspirations to be an officer of the law. When he witnesses a murder committed by a gang led by Vinnie Fountain (Ray Sharkey), Devon refuses to testify unless he is offered the chance to be a policeman. To humor him, Devon is paired up with fiery cop Nick McKenna (Burt Reynolds) for a day as the two pursue the killers.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: A riotous and raunchy exploration of the most eagerly anticipated -- and most humiliating -- rite of adulthood, known as losing one's virginity. In this hilarious lesson in life, love and libido, a group of friends, fed up with their well-deserved reputations as sexual no-hitters, decide to take action.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: After a year apart - attending different schools, meeting different people - the guys rent a beach house and vow to make this the best summer ever. As it turns out, whether that will happen or not has a lot to do with the girls. Between the wild parties, outrageous revelations and yes, a trip to band camp, they discover that times change and people change, but in the end, it's all about sticking together.

programme.title: American Reunion
programme.desc: In the summer of 1999, four small-town Michigan boys began a quest to lose their virginity. In the ensuing years, Jim (Jason Biggs) has married Michelle (Alyson Hannigan), though Kevin (Thomas Ian Nicholas) has left Vicky (Tara Reid). Oz (Chris Klein) has grown apart from Heather (Mena Suvari), but Finch still has the hots for Stiffler's (Seann William Scott) mom (Jennifer Coolidge). These lifelong friends have come home to reminisce about -- and become inspired by -- their former teen selves.

programme.title: Elyse
programme.desc: A psychiatrist and a nurse try to help a catatonic woman at a state hospital.

programme.title: Love Spreads
programme.desc: Tensions rise when members of an all-female rock band gather to record their second album.

programme.title: Meander
programme.desc: A woman gets locked in a series of bizarre tubes filled with dangerous traps.

programme.desc: German Cabrera is a man obsessed with recording the violent crime that permeates the streets of Guatemala City. His obsession places him in the line of fire in one of the most dangerous cities in the world.

programme.title: Middle Men
programme.desc: Jack Harris (Luke Wilson) is a legitimate Texas businessman who wanders off the straight-and-narrow path when he meets Wayne Beering (Giovanni Ribisi) and Buck Dolby (Gabriel Macht), a slimy pair of Internet porn profiteers. Jack's association with the men leads to his involvement with a host of other lowlifes, and though he tries to convince himself that he is staying clean in a dirty business, his disintegrating family situation proves otherwise.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: Maternal Instinct
programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.title: A Resistance
programme.desc: Imprisoned for protesting Japan, Gwan-sun unites inmates and sparks a resistance that lives beyond her death.

programme.title: We Are Brothers
programme.desc: An adopted pastor reunites with his shaman brother and together they search for their mother with dementia.

programme.title: Star: Radiant Love
programme.desc: Asian star Romi feels attracted to Ara a common girl. Scandal maker Susie plots something big between them.

programme.title: Double Patty
programme.desc: Woo-ram a struggling athlete and big foodie finds himself in a burger restaurant one fateful evening unaware that a simple double patty hamburger would change his life. He Instantly clicks with Hyun-ji an aspiring news anchor who works hard at the restaurant to make ends meet. As their relationship grows so do their confidence strength and determination to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Little Brother
programme.desc: A warming and touching drama about a 9-year-old troublemaker who suddenly starts behaving himself believing that being good can save his ill brother.

programme.title: B grade Twenties
programme.desc: "Kyeo-re," a 4th-year student majoring in film directing at an art school, pours her heart and soul into her graduation film screenplay one morning, only to have it stolen by her former boyfriend and senior in the same major, "Hyun-soo." Shocked and devastated, Kyeore quickly begins preparing a new screenplay. Imperfect as it may be, it brings together a group of graduation film team members, capturing their growth and love story.

programme.title: 3.5th Period
programme.desc: In Shin-ha High School, there's a secret hidden between the 3rd and 4th periods. It's the existence of a 3.5th period where time flows ten times slower, turning 10 minutes into 100. Baek Ah-jin accidentally enters the 3.5th period and meets Kang Da-won, a male student trapped there. To help Da-won escape from the 3.5th period, Ah-jin unravels the mysteries hidden there. However, there are those who hinder their efforts and strive to conceal the 3.5th period. What secrets are hidden in Shin-ha High School's 3.5th period? Will Da-won successfully escape and reunite with Ah-jin?

programme.title: 26 Years
programme.desc: A gang member, an ex-national shooter, a policeman and a businessman who lost their family members during Gwangju Massacre in 1980 set an assassination plot against the ex-president who responsible, because he never apologise.

programme.title: The Lying Truth
programme.desc: A rapper is accused of assault by a beautiful video vixen. He says it was consensual. One of them will be exposed as a liar when the truth is revealed.

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: Jessica Johnson, a journalist, has just learned that her brother has died. Upon moving into his apartment to pick up his belongings she notices an old camera. She has no idea about the secrets behind the camera left behind. It's only a matter of time before she begins to hear and see visions only behind the camera or whenever the camera is near. Is it real? or is she hallucinating?

programme.title: Dark Seed
programme.desc: The ticking of her biological clock brings Emon, a hard-driving executive in line for a big promotion, to a decision not shared by her amiable husband Idreese in this intimate drama. A guilty secret buried in her past and an unspoken trauma lurking in his bring on a crisis, as the future of their seemingly perfect marriage hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Take A Stan
programme.desc: Lisa James, a Sociology Professor, escapes her abusive husband, Stan, and seeks refuge with one of her students. How long will it take before Stan finds out where she has been hiding?

programme.title: Bluest Moon
programme.desc: Friends must lean on one another for relationship advice in order to find peace within their individual relationships with men. Sheila needs a lot more than friendly advice when it comes to her relationships. She needs professional help. Will she realize this before it's too late?'

programme.desc: A rancher and his wife search for an elusive horse, but the rancher's sidekick may have plans of his own.

programme.desc: A drifter takes on marauding Apaches in order to save a group of besieged settlers.

programme.title: There's a Noose Waiting for You Trinity!
programme.desc: Trinity is an ex-gunslinger desperately wanting to be forgiven and accepted by his family.

programme.title: Shango
programme.desc: Shango is a Texas Ranger who finds himself up against a former Confederate officer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brothers mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: A clumsy fortune-hunter doubles for a notorious gunfighter.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: An outlaw (Myron Healey) poses as a marshal in an attempt to free his brother from jail. With Paul McGuire, Gail Davis.

programme.desc: Deputy Sheriff Plunkett shoots Hoppy's brother, Buddy, in the back, leading Hoppy to disguise himself as an outlaw to get revenge.

programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy
programme.desc: Hoppy grieves for Lucky when a posse, believing Lucky to be a bank robber, runs him off a cliff and into a river a devious lawyer seeks to dominate the valley by taking control of a rancher's precious cattle.

programme.title: Great Day in the Morning
programme.desc: In Denver before the outbreak of the Civil War, North Carolina native Owen Pentecost (Robert Stack) tricks saloon owner Jumbo Means (Raymond Burr) into losing everything he owns -- including some valuable mining claims -- in a card game. As headstrong dressmaker Ann (Virginia Mayo) and bartender Boston (Ruth Roman) spar over Owen's affections, his fellow Southerners begin assembling their gold to fund the Confederate Army, as the town's Northerners form their own militia and prepare for war.

programme.desc: Martin Donovan plays a deadly game of politics.

programme.desc: A noted prosecutor faces a young associate defending a man accused of murder.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A crusading reporter investigates an Arizona land baron.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: In a Nevada mining town, a woman dealing with a sick son and a broke husband longs to move back East, but an Army major helps change her mind.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A prospector, double-crossed by his partner and left to die in the desert, finds salvation in an Indian girl named Lupin who puts a curse on his would-be killer.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Meek Stubby Weeks and brawny Dutch Hogan compete for the same girl.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An escaped killer holds hostage Harry and Evelyn Nelson, a couple on the verge of divorce.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An Army private tries to save an emaciated racehorse about to be destroyed.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When a number of grifters show up at a wealthy man's family reunion, he sees through their aliases and shows them the error of their ways by treating them like true relatives.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A man of the cloth finds it difficult to adjust to life in a rugged desert town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A newlywed on his honeymoon falls for a phony gold-mine swindle.

programme.sub-title: The Longest Beard in the World
programme.desc: A Congressional candidate is encouraged to go to the Chicago World's Fair as the man with the longest beard in the world.

programme.title: Part I

programme.title: Part II
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations.

programme.desc: Back in Texas, Capt. Call organizes a mustang drive to Montana.

programme.desc: Buck is the target of hostility when Sweetwater is threatened by a local tribe.

programme.desc: The cowboys remove a dangerous cow from a rancher's herd Bubba continues to work for his father-in-law and is rewarded with a hefty payout Misty convinces Cody to give her his ranch horse wedding planning causes tension between Booger and Jaclyn.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way

programme.desc: As Yoon Hyuk takes office, he orders the officials of the three agencies to all be re-evaluated. Meanwhile, the fake appeal for vicarious governing has wreaked havoc in the palace, and the king is suspecting the Crown Prince of treason. Dal Moon, who used to work for the Crown Prince, is moved by his past feelings for Yoon Yeong and starts to work in her favor.

programme.title: Haechi Ep.14
programme.desc: The special judiciary agency is opened to investigate the Crown Prince's involvement in treacherous plottings. Wi Byeong Joo was being interrogated but is released and takes charge of the treason case. Dal Moon is now working for Prince Milpoong. He spreads rumors in the city, saying that the Crown Prince isn't the late king's son. Moon Soo and his colleagues find evidence related to Byeong Joo's coverup of Jeong Seok's murder.

programme.title: Haechi Ep.15
programme.desc: Prince Yeoning persuades Min Jin Heon to side with him for the moment and stops the special judiciary agency. Meanwhile, Dal Moon turns out to have been secretly supporting the Crown Prince by trying to extract information from Prince Milpoong. The Crown Prince visits Prince Milpoong to help Dal Moon get the decisive information. Moon Soo finds evidence for Byeong Joo's murder of Jeong Seok and decides to do a night inspection.

programme.title: Haechi Ep.16
programme.desc: Prince Milpoong murders a guard in the court palace, and the guards issue an emergency. The Crown Prince swears to make Prince Milpoong pay for his crimes. Dal Moon tells Yoon Yeong that he had to deceive Prince Milpoong to save her and help the Crown Prince. Byeong Joo is arrested but refuses to admit his crimes and instead says Moon Soo would have done the same thing. The king announces that the treason case was fabricated.

programme.title: Haechi Ep.17
programme.desc: King Gyeongjong suddenly falls ill, and there are suspicions that Prince Milpoong sneaked into the Royal Infirmary. The Crown Prince stops the royal doctors from giving medicine to the King in case it was poisoned. But his position as Crown Prince is endangered as he comes under suspicion of trying to take the throne. Private doctors are called to the palace to examine the King.

programme.title: Haechi Ep.18
programme.desc: King Gyeongjong dies of poisoning, and a rumor spreads that the Crown Prince let him die intentionally. The Chief Justice blames the Crown Prince and objects to his enthronement. The Crown Prince himself questions himself in self-doubt. But with his former teacher's support, the Crown Prince goes to meet Queen Dowager and take control.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.5
programme.desc: Five years have passed, and Jung Sun and Hyun Soo meet again. Hyun Soo tells him that she regretted missing his call the day that he left. Won Joon finds out that Hong Ah is working as Hyun Soo's assistant. He calls her to confront her for making Jung Sun and Won Joon believe that Hyun Soo was going to get married.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.6
programme.desc: Hyun Soo and Yi Bok go head-to-head on the script of "Unruly Detectives". She calls Jung Sun, who misses her call. The two go on a run together to help ease Hyun Soo's stress over her drama. Meanwhile, Hong Ah meets Jung Woo. She gives him a copy of a script she had written.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.7
programme.desc: Jung Sun goes to Hyun Soo to comfort her. After Jung Sun cancelled on her, Hong Ah goes to Hyun Soo's house. Much to her surprise, Jung Sun opens the door to Hyun Soo's home. Meanwhile, Jung Woo goes to convince Ha Rim to return to the shoot, and Jung Sun confides in Hyun Soo over his restaurant.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.8
programme.desc: Hyun Soo decides to quit writing the script for "Unruly Detectives". She struggles with her decision as her future as a writer may be over. After Jung Sun's TV appearance, things are looking up for Good Soup. Jung Woo works hard to solve the problems that came from Hyun Soo quitting the drama. Meanwhile, Hong Ah spends more time with Won Joon.

programme.title: Love Temperature Ep.9

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Deer the Hard Way: Prince of Wales Island (Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen)
programme.desc: Steven Rinella has hunted this area before, but he feels he's just scratched the surface exploring the surrounding country. The top of the mountain is always calling Steve's name, and for this serious Alaskan backpack hunt he's bringing along comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen. Cold, wet weather and tough hunting for wily Sitka deer make this a southeast Alaskan adventure these hunters will never forget.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: As the prime cuts are often the first to go, most families are left with a freezer brimming with ground wild game meat. Pulled from the pages of his forthcoming Wild Game Cookbook, Steve shares a variety of recipes from burger to meatloaf and more ‚Äì designed to whittle down this supply and jazz up your ground meat game.

programme.sub-title: Sky Island Solitaire: Backpack Hunting Coues Deer in Arizona
programme.desc: Steve returns to southern Arizona to stalk the elusive Coues deer. Unaccompanied, Steve immerses himself in the quiet southwest desert and gets intimate with one of the most wary animals in the west. Throughout the hunt, Steve articulates why solo time in trophy country is good for the soul.

programme.title: The Coldest Hunt: Nunivak Island Muskox

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The last time Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen went out with Steven Rinella they were soaked head to toe and came home meatless. To remedy their meat crisis while keeping them dry, Steve sets up a springtime wild turkey hunt in sunny California. Steve gives Joe and Bryan the A to Z on hunting, butchering, and cooking the wild turkey. Steve caps off the introductory lesson by preparing his favorite turkey recipe: Schnitzel.

programme.desc: Danny Johnson's hilarious, clean stand-up has entertained audiences in comedy clubs, corporate events, and churches nationwide. Often called a cross between Jerry Seinfeld and Kevin James Danny's show is relatable, engaging, and always hilarious. Danny has starred in numerous TV commercials, Comedy Central's Laugh Riots, Florida's Funniest Comedian semi-finalist, Winner-Carnival Cruise line Comedy Challenge, Finalist in Search for the One Christian Comedy contest, and has had the pleasure of sharing the stage with Chris Rock, Bob Saget, Billy Gardell, Richard Lewis, and a variety of others. Danny has led a dual track career for over a decade achieving success in both corporate America and as a comedian. Blending his unique skill sets led to him publishing his first book, "You Stink and They Know It! A practical guide to nailing your next job interview."

programme.title: Bob Zany
programme.sub-title: I Think I Handled That Well
programme.desc: He simply reaches into a bottomless grab bag of jokes, so smooth and effortless that it would be easy to overlook just how much talent and skill is behind the process'"

programme.title: K-Von
programme.desc: Half-Persian and raised in a religious family, K-Von's comedy unites sharp cultural riffs with clean delivery. In this special he takes on political correctness, cyber bullying, and the utility of cargo pants.

programme.title: Joe Zimmerman
programme.desc: Joe Zimmerman grew up in Morgantown, West Virginia, and started his comedy career in North Carolina. While living in the South, his stand-up group the Beards of Comedy landed a record deal with Comedy Central Records.

programme.title: Nick Arnette: Boomers and Hipsters
programme.desc: LA comic, Nick Arnette, riffs on starting to date grandmas, his border exchange policy, and why Baby Boomers are the coolest generation.

programme.title: Max Dolcelli
programme.desc: New York comedian Max Dolcelli uses his cynacism and enigmatic stage presence to riff on Waze, Dollar Store pregnancy tests, and how horrible toys were when he was a kid.

programme.title: Steve Soelberg
programme.desc: Extremely funny comedian and overall nice person Steve Soelberg brings an observational, story telling style of comedy which has repeatedly left his regularly sold out audiences in stitches. Whether he's relating the experiences of growing up in a large family in Seattle, Washington or recounting the time he saw an angry guy in a tutu at a Ragnar relay, he has a way of making each audience member feel as if they were just the person he wanted to tell the story to because he knew they'd enjoy it just as much as he did. Due to his growing popularity as a comedian, he has appeared multiple times on local TV affiliates (Fox, KUTV, and KSL), on the radio, and has entertained tens of thousands traveling the country not only as comedian, but also as the voice of the Ragnar relay races as their race announcer and emcee. Steve's positive, upbeat personality paired with his observational, often self deprecating humor and his ability to appeal to a broad audience guarantee his shows will be a hilarious and memorable experience for all those who attend.

programme.title: Tommy Ryman
programme.desc: Tommy Ryman grew up with a new-age, folk singing mother and a traditional, Lutheran insurance-agent father. This XY equation evidently equals: acclaimed comedian. Ryman has earned the title of Semifinalist on NBC's Last Comic Standing. Roseanne Barr, a professed fan, raves she has “never seen anything like Tommy before in her whole life, he is one-of-a-kind, fantastic!” Ryman also recently won the title of Best of the Midwest at the prestigious Gilda's Laugh Fest. Ryman's act can be described as absurdist and clever, masked behind a very likable and innocent demeanor, often thought of as awkwardly charming. He is a favorite among audiences at top clubs, corporates, and colleges around the nation.

programme.title: Card Sharks
programme.desc: This show from legendary Mark Goodson-Bill Todman Productions features two contestants trying to predict answers to survey questions for the opportunity to play a game with oversized playing cards for a chance to win cash. One contestant guesses how many people (out of 100) gave a certain answer to a question and the other contestant then guesses if the number is higher or lower than the opponent's guess. The winning contestant then faces a row of cards and must determine if each succeeding card is higher or lower than the one that precedes it. The contestant who wins two out of three games wins the match and plays the bonus round, called Money Cards. The Money Cards round is similar to the card game in the main game but with three levels of cards instead of one row. The contestant is given $200 at the beginning of Money Cards and wagers any or all of that money when guessing if the cards will be higher or lower than the previous one. A perfect round could earn the contestant $28,800.

programme.title: Rattlesnake Rattle – You Won't Believe What's Inside!

programme.title: Did I Find a Murder Hornet in the USA?!

programme.title: Top 13 Most Painful Insect Stings Coyote Peterson Has Ever Taken!

programme.title: Exploring Most Haunted House in America!

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: South of Barcelona lies the Ebro Delta. Its beaches and lagoons are an exceptional refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known for the numerous pink flamingos that nest near the glittering white saltworks. Sea salt is extracted and rice is cultivated in the delta. The impressive lake landscape is endangered to a certain extent by human intervention. For fear of their harvest, some rice farmers take action against flocks of birds. Invasive rice pests are also a threat to farmers in Europe's largest rice growing region. Other problems make the situation more difficult, such as climate change and rising sea levels or dams holding back sediments. What can be done to preserve the unique Ebro Delta?

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.sub-title: Rhine-Meuse Delta The Land of Canals
programme.desc: In the heart of Europe lies a unique biotope and a landscape characterised by water: the Rhine-Meuse Delta. Around a third of the Netherlands lies in the heart of Europe, below sea level, with 3,500 polders as a buffer for excess water and numerous cities crossed by canals. It is also a region where nature borders directly on cities, where intensive agriculture gradually leaves its place to the water, where the largest nature parks are in the immediate vicinity of Rotterdam's largest industrial port. From the sources of the Waal to the port of Rotterdam, we encounter protected plant, bird and mammal species, as well as the Delta inhabitants who have created this unique habitat.

programme.title: Planet 4K
programme.sub-title: South East Asia - From Myanmar to Cambodia
programme.desc: South East Asia offers mysterious old cultures, steaming cook-shops, exotic plants and animals, and monks deep in prayer. A journey through this area reveals everything that life has to offer. We visit Myanmar, where tourism is still in its infancy and undisturbed temples and nature are sights to behold. Then, in Cambodia we find the mysterious temples of Angkor. And finally, we head over to Vietnam to enjoy the beaches, rivers, and Buddhist pagodas.

programme.desc: South East Asia offers mysterious old cultures, steaming cook-shops, exotic plants and animals, and monks deep in prayer. Then, in Cambodia we find the mysterious temples of Angkor. And finally, we head over to Vietnam to enjoy the beaches, rivers, and Buddhist pagodas.

programme.title: Planet 4K
programme.sub-title: South America - From Ecuador to Bolivia
programme.desc: The film takes you on a journey that begins deep in the rainforest and ends in Patagonia with its glaciers and snow-capped volcanoes. During the earth's formation, the South American continent evolved as the most autonomous of the continents. The area developed its own unique flora and fauna, jungles with unbelievable biodiversity, climbers and vines. Even today, the number of tropical plants in the region remains a mystery. A trip to South America is a glimpse into the past. The film takes you on a journey that begins deep in the rainforest and ends in Patagonia with its glaciers and snow-capped volcanoes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: Early September of 2008 saw radical imagery on the hurricane maps of the Atlantic – four named tropical storms, swirling in a train across the ocean. “Angry Planet” was there as three of them made landfall as hurricanes in the US. We filmed gustaf in Louisiana, Hanna in North Carolina, then flew with the USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over cuba, and met it again as it made a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.3
programme.desc: Even in the wilds of nature, everybody's a comedian.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.8
programme.desc: Some of Earth's smallest critters can make the biggest impact.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Perilous Pursuit
programme.desc: Say storm chasing and people think destructive tornadoes and ferocious winds, but those are only a few of the dangerous elements storm hunters Mark and Jaclyn encounter when pursuing extreme weather.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Blizzard 2016
programme.desc: A white monster charges up the Eastern Seaboard, and 80 million citizens are in its path. Mark battles the forces about to overwhelm iconic, and heavily populated, places in America.

programme.title: Angry Planet | B.C. Caving
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada's West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we'll witness George's explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Italia Wild
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Kenya
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here's the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here's the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here's the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world's most deadly virus. So here's the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Indian Monsoon
programme.desc: In June of next year we plan to intercept the Monsoon as it hits southern India and makes its way north along the western shore past Goa and Mumbai up to Delhi.This most famous of torrential rainy seasons drops as much as 40 feet of water on parts of the parched sub-continent.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Iceland
programme.desc: The Land of Ice and Fire – Iceland – is a fascinating and ruggedly demanding country - a perfect subject for exploration by “Angry Planet”. The northern island nation has many of the wild features that we love – volcanoes, glaciers, avalanches, mudslides, big waves, and extreme marine weather. All that – plus weird red and green lights dancing around in the winter sky!

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: Early September of 2008 saw radical imagery on the hurricane maps of the Atlantic – four named tropical storms, swirling in a train across the ocean. “Angry Planet” was there as three of them made landfall as hurricanes in the US. We filmed gustaf in Louisiana, Hanna in North Carolina, then flew with the USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over cuba, and met it again as it made a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn about Seasons
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

But when Molly breaks the news that they'll have to leave the skeleton for professionals to dig up, Rev wonders how he can still have a dinosaur of his own.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. But when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her to stay, showing her that Fender Bend is the best place to live-despite Avery's protests that she's too busy. Finally, Avery confronts their strange behaviour.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: Rev is sure he has the perfect plan to catch an elusive frog, but Avery isn't so sure. After all of his attempts fall through, he's finally ready to accept help-and Avery's idea just might work! Will they finally catch the Green Phantom? // Rev and Avery compete to transport supplies to town for a big event. Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day // The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her...

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. Covered in goop and debris, Rumble scares them into thinking he's the Beast! Avery hatches a plan to trap the "Beast" and save Rumble, who's gone missing

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When Rumble cracks his mirror, he thinks it gave him bad luck, and his confidence takes a hit. Even after Rev fixes the mirror and bolsters his pal, the bad luck continues. But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: IncrediTales
programme.desc: IncrediTales - Tricky Wolf: Alice is eating a yummy ice cream in the park but Wolf is up to his old tricks.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: THE WAWIES
programme.desc: Wawaland is a tiny world within planet Earth. So small and light that it gets carried away by the wind. Right now, it could be flying over Tokyo, Paris, or the Atlantic Ocean, completely unseen by humans. In this magical place live The Wawies—chubby and curious beings who are always asking questions and trying to make sense of the world around them and ours. Through Sha's far-away glasses, the Wawies can observe how humans behave on Earth and apply what they learn in their own world, sparking endless adventures that teach them, entertain them, help them explore their surroundings, and listen to themselves. They always stick together and never leave anyone behind. For example, this season, you might find them competing in their own version of Wawachef,” escaping from some not-so-friendly monkeys, deciding to ban rules in their world forever, trying to calm down some feisty ants, training their patience to care for a garden, or figuring out which costume party is more fun: Halloween or Carnival. With each adventure, Sha, Opo, Aca, Bow, and Tok strive to understand, grow, and have fun. And along the way, they'll unintentionally create their own set of rules to live in a place where respect and harmony with their surroundings are key. With its playful and cheerful tone, Wawaland seeks to show children a different way of seeing things—helping them appreciate the world around them and, most importantly, themselves.

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Berry and Dolly
programme.desc: Berry, the little snail boy and Dolly, the ladybird are best friends. Together they discover the world around them, while they make new friends with Balthazar the bee, Flutter the butterfly, Stanley the stag-beetle, Leapy the grasshopper, and many others.

programme.title: Stella And Sam
programme.desc: As they explore the world in all its seasons, Stella and Sam have wild adventures and comical mishaps. They make friends and discover many things - especially about themselves. If Sam is bold enough to rescue Fred from the sprinkler, then maybe he really can be brave enough to have a sleepover in the backyard tent. Every day is a new adventure, and Stella and Sam share the joy of discovering that they have what it takes to face the biggest adventure of all... growing up.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: A satisfying compilation of underwater art like Submarine and Seahorse along with a dreamy touch of a Shooting Star and many more.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing's this episode features satisfying artworks like Glitter Fish and Shooting Star.

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: The best of the fun nursery rhymes are here. Five Little Monkeys Song, Ten in the bed & more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Let's charm the little ones with our peppy Teacher song, The Shark Song, Mr Sun and many more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Fill the day with music and fun with Ice-cream Song, Clap Your Hands, Johny Johny Yes Papa and more!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Every kids loves Head Shoulders Knees and Toes, Old MacDonlad had a Farm & all the nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Learn colors with the Colors Song and tap your feet to the fun beats of Dance Song and much more!

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: Take a musical trip every morning with Down by the Bay, Outside my window I see, Car Song and more!

programme.desc: ducktv favorites are the most popular ducktv shows, representing different educational values. Just to name a few, the series Mimo and Bobo develops social skills, Fireteam fosters problem- solving, while Shaping Up promotes shape and color identification.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: The Missing

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Eunice y Ninón, frente a frente en la morgue donde están los restos de Pilar. La Felina a punta de pistola amenaza con asesinarla, por haber liquidado a su amiga. Exige exámenes toxicológicos.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Rutila y Javi se acercan más de la cuenta, acuerdan no mencionar a Aurelio Casillas. Mónica abandona a Tony, su único nexo será el negocio. La Felina tras la pista del celular de Pilar.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Rutila le concederá la entrevista a Uzcátegui, en la cual, promete hablar de todo. La Felina consigue pistas sobre Pilar y le pide a Aurelio que investigue más pero sin la ayuda de Ninón.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio y Mónica tienen una cita cargada de sinceridad, nostalgia, reproches y traiciones, sollozan y beben. Él cede, pero no tanto. La Felina conoce a Leonardo, el punto débil de Ninón.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Cuando Esperanza contacta a Ismael, rastrean la llamada. En España, Aurelio sigue deprimido tras la desaparición de Pilar recuerda sus encuentros con Mónica y promete eliminar a Esperanza.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Todos coinciden en Tenerife. Aurelio, la Madame y Alí, la Marina de España, la DEA y la Interpol. Hay nervios, pero Casillas sabe cómo rescatar las 30 toneladas de droga incautadas.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio convence a Niñón que financie la renta de los aviones necesarios en España, para así recuperar el cargamento incautado.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Tony y Mónica hacen negocios con Doble 30 y piensan dejar a Ninón fuera. También planean el secuestro de su hijo. Le dieron instrucciones a Alí para proceder con el ataque.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Explotación de hombres Papá está vivo
programme.desc: Tony cree que los videos de Alejandra para cazar un Sugar Daddy son su perdición. Jaqueline autoriza la desconexión de un hombre hospitalizado, pero este resultó ser el padre de otra persona.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Franco es policía y demanda a su ex Johana porque ella finge el secuestro de sus hijos para huir de sus maltratos. Exagente de ICE deporta a su papá, ahora quiere hacer lo mismo con su hermano.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Andrea demanda a Héctor por usar imágenes de su hija, muerta de leucemia, en vallas que la señalan como portadora de VIH. A Manuela la casaron cuando era menor de edad y ahora pide el divorcio.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Fui violado, me too Prostitución legal
programme.desc: Lo protege durante el día, pero de noche lo viola y le dice que él es gay. Rafael descubre que su esposa Doris tiene en la casa un negocio de prostitución con muñecas inflables.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Miriam cría gallinas y tiene reglas muy estrictas en su casa, le renta un cuarto a Arturo, pero no lo deja vivir en paz. Natalia acepta un empleo en "topless", un cliente intenta violarla.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Hija de migrantes intenta quitarse de encima ese estigma y elimina su lengua natal, el español. En otro caso, Favo y Tormento son raperos y se enfrentan por la letra de una canción.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Señalan a Juan de participar en el secuestro y muerte de una parte de la familia de Abel. Debby subasta el agua de unos baños que se dio y su amigo Josué le exige la mitad del dinero ganado.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Vianey quiere proteger a su hermana, pues su madre permitió que su padrastro la abusara sexualmente. Clara le disputa a César la custodia de sus dos hijos, lo considera una mala influencia.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.desc: Vanessa se encarga del huerto urbano del edificio, pero como es costumbre, alguien intenta hurtarlo. Roco tiene hinchado una mejilla debido a un dolor de muela, pero se niega a ir al dentista.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Roco y Magdalena tiran a la calle el colchón viejo de Arturo, más tarde tratarán de recuperarlo. Por otra parte, Pedro le renta un cuarto a Vanessa, al mismo tiempo que Cris se muda a vivir con él.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: Apolinar, Zacarías y el Menona se enteran que el Botarga y el Faquir los traicionaron haciendo un nuevo grupo. Los Héroes se quejan con Olegaria y ella les dice que si no se organizan, las Heroínas les ganarán.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: Los Héroes tratan de escribir nuevas canciones pero su inspiración se encuentra perdida los Héroes buscan a Roger de los Santos para que los represente.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: Natasha le dice a Zacarías que quiere ponerse borracha con él. Olegaria les pide a las Heroínas que firmen unos documentos para desintegrar al grupo definitivamente.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: El Menona ve el video de Cornelia en la televisión y se enoja Natasha acepta casarse con Zacarías.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: Doña Olegaria se da unas vacaciones por recomendación de los Héroes y se va a una clínica para que le hagan una cirugía plástica, pero durante la operación muere.

programme.title: Una familia de diez: La enfermera
programme.desc: Por unos estornudos de Placido, la Nena será la enfermera encargada de cuidarlo. Mientras, Gaby se convierte en maquilladora y peinadora.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mabel le pide a Diego quedarse con su papá, porque no quiere que lo lastime. Por su parte, Roberta le aclara a Teo que él no es culpable de la muerte de su hermano. Diego le dice a Roberta que Joaquín la engaña con Mía.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Teo quiere saber si es verdad que su hermano estaba drogado cuando se accidentó, pero sus padres lo niegan Roberta le dice a Mia que Joaquín anda con las dos y, al vengarse de él, le provoca un accidente todos creen que Nico es dueño de un café.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma logra que Roberta le cuente sobre su decepción amorosa con Joaquín Franco encuentra a Mia cantando en un café y la castiga Celina le dice a Mia que Vico salió con Miguel y que tuvieron relaciones Joaquín llega en muletas al colegio.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Vico se enoja con Celina por decir que Miguel pasó la noche en su casa Mia descubre que Vico es novia de Miguel Mabel le dice a Diego que lo sacará del colegio la mamá de Nico se enoja al saber que le gusta Lupita y que no es judía.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia y Roberta hacen creer a todos que Joaquín es homosexual Celina golpea a Vico por Miguel Nico termina con Lupita porque quiere a otra Franco cree que Mia está enferma Miguel y Diego descubren que los quieren contratar para cantar en el café.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma le dice a Franco que Mia le importa el señor Mendiola amenaza a Pascual con despedirlo si no pone orden en el colegio Miguel le dice a Franco que Mia puede atentar contra su salud Tomás se preocupa porque Diego quiere secuestrarse a sí mismo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Advertido por Madariaga, León arruina los planes de Diego y detiene a uno de sus escoltas por intentar ayudarlo con el autosecuestro. Roberta se opone a que Mía forme parte de la banda. Diego confronta a Tomás por haberlo delatarlo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía sufre un ataque al ver una foto de Colucci con Alma en el periódico. Roberta invita a Celina a cantar en la banda. Roberta y Lupita piensan que Jose roba comida para venderla. León le dice a Diego que su mamá decidió no divorciarse.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor: Triste despedida
programme.desc: Rodrigo y familiares le dan el último adiós a Gloria en su funeral. Santos y María muestran su amor en el escenario al cantar juntos. Rubén idea un nuevo plan para deshacerse de Santos y poder recuperar el amor de María.

programme.title: Pasión y poder: Demostrar que es el mejor
programme.desc: Después de reconocerlo como su hijo, Eladio pide a Franco que deje de querer demostrar que es mejor que todos Daniela escapa de la clínica de rehabilitación y viaja a Monterrey en busca de David, pero al llegar lo escucha decir que aún ama a Regina.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Gabriela comienza a alucinar después de haber caído en un pozo. Sofía le exige a Fernando que encuentre a Gabriela. Fernando enfurece al ver que Demián rescató a Gabriela del pozo. Juan sospecha que Apolinar quiere matarlo.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Sofía acude a la comisaría para pedir ayuda y poder encontrar a Juan. El padre Tadeo les pide a Óscar y a Franco que acepten que Juan está muerto. Juan le reclama a Leonora por no decirle que un hombre lo ha estado buscando.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Gilberto intenta que Gabriela recapacite y pueda recuperar el amor de sus hijas. Gilberto le confiesa a Gabriela que no está enferma del corazón. Sofía tiene la esperanza de que Capricho encuentre Juan.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan comienza a recordar su pasado. Gilberto le pide a Leonora que lo perdone por haber sido un mal padre. Gabriela le agradece a Demián por haberla salvado del pozo donde se encontraba.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Gilberto reconoce a Juan y le habla sobre su pasado. Juan se prepara para regresar al pueblo y recordar su pasado. Sofía se impresiona al ver a Juan de nuevo en el pueblo. Sofía le exige a Juan saber dónde dejó a su bebé.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana: Hermanas en peligro
programme.desc: Maribel cubre a Ana Lucía en la presentación para que ella vaya con Marcelo al hospital y sufre un accidente. Ana Laura le dispara a Valentín para salvar a Ramiro.

programme.title: Cambiando el destino
programme.desc: Un grupo de jóvenes se pierde en el desierto al caer su avión, mientras que lejos de ahí su empresario los espera.

programme.title: Dos cruces en el ocaso
programme.desc: Gustavo debe matar para sobrevivir. Cuando regresa después de ser expulsado de su hogar, se enfrenta a lo que le ha sucedido a su familia en su ausencia.

programme.title: Balún Canán
programme.desc: Unos brujos condenan a una mujer a un destino feroz porque hizo cosas crueles para conservar su finca.

programme.desc: Un grupo de jóvenes se pierde en el desierto al caer su avión, mientras que lejos de ahí su empresario los espera.

programme.desc: Dos hombres y una mujer se enfrentan a la corrupción política y a sus propias pasiones.

programme.title: Pata de Palo
programme.desc: Una joven acepta casarse con un hombre cojo para salvar a su abuelo, responsable de un accidente de tren.

programme.title: Héroe a la fuerza
